name: Crush Golf + Grill
address: 1108 W Black Mountain Dr, St. George, UT 84790
about: Crush Golf + Grill is a high-tech golf simulator venue that combines a virtual driving range with a restaurant and bar. The facility features Trackman Range radar technology across multiple bays, allowing players to practice their swing, play virtual courses, or engage in interactive games. Pricing is per hour, per tee box, which can accommodate up to six guests. The venue offers a casual, family-friendly atmosphere where both golfers and non-golfers can enjoy food, drinks, and various activities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman radar technology provides detailed shot tracking and instant feedback
Ability to play on dozens of legendary virtual golf courses from around the world
Indoor, climate-controlled facility ensures playable conditions year-round
Casual, non-intimidating atmosphere is welcoming to players of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated American sports bar menu with gluten-free and vegan options, served from a scratch kitchen
Full bar with crafted cocktails, draft beers, and specialty mocktails available

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor tracks every shot across all tee boxes and provides detailed performance data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue does not specify if rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own kitchen and bar serving crave-worthy eats and crafted drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Pricing is per hour, per tee box, but a specific duration for 18 holes is not provided.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is very kid-friendly, featuring a putting course, outdoor yard with lawn games, and welcomes families.
